headline: Exclusive: Paxos Labs raises $12 million after startup spins off from veteran stablecoin issuer
summary: Charles Cascarilla, the CEO of the stablecoin issuer Paxos, is also the CEO of Paxos Labs.

raw.headline: Exclusive: Paxos Labs raises $12 million after startup spins off from veteran stablecoin issuer
raw.summary: Charles Cascarilla, the CEO of the stablecoin issuer Paxos, is also the CEO of Paxos Labs.

headline: PayPal integrates Pix into PPCP for small businesses in Brazil
summary: With the new integration, SMBs using PPCP can present Pix alongside other payment options within the same checkout experience.

raw.headline: PayPal integrates Pix into PPCP for small businesses in Brazil
raw.summary: With the new integration, SMBs using PPCP can present Pix alongside other payment options within the same checkout experience.
